scene.setting: a dark room with a computer screen displaying technical data and text in Chinese and English.

objects.name: computer screen
objects.description: A computer monitor displaying a user interface with text, numbers, and a map. The text includes '有内鬼, 終止交易' (There is a mole, terminate transaction), 'SEND MESSAGE ALL GSM900', '2way communication', and 'DETECT GSM900 52 SELECT CELL'. The screen also shows a map with a red box highlighting a specific area and a list of phone numbers.

audio_description: Electronic beeps and a low, continuous hum are audible.
temporal_description: The screen content changes, showing different text and data.
